The '''Fifth Fleet''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] was a fleet under the command of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]. It was initially tasked with patrolling the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. It was formed out of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]].

In [[36 ABY]], the Fifth fleet was dispatched to the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] to initiate a [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockade]] in the hopes of containing the massing [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] fleet of [[nest ship]]s.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], under the command of Admiral [[Cheb]], it served in the [[Blockade of Corellia]].

The fleet was devastated at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]. The fleet was surrounded by the superior [[Confederation]] fleet, and sustained heavy damage. Admiral [[Atoko]] wanted to surrender and scuttle the ships, rather than risk the capture of his ships and the deaths of his crews, but the Fifth Fleet was able to fight its way to safety. Following its fighting retreat from Kashyyyk, the Fifth Fleet returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. After the [[Second Battle of Roche]], the remains of the Fifth Fleet were sent to [[Battle of Mandalore (Second Galactic Civil War)|bombard]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].
